race.description: Peter Milling & Company Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: BADGERS BRIDGE (8) improving mare who ran a much better race when she gripped on to finish third over 800m at Narromine on the heavy (10) surface. Awkward draw but finds a very average race. SUNSET DRIVE (6) on the quick back-up when he failed to get into the contest from the outside gate with a dismal twelfth over 1100m at Dubbo in a Super Maiden. Claim helps again in a weaker race. Keep safe. BLOOMIN' HELL (9) races best when given a sit and a win looks imminent. Caught the eye with a tough second over 1100m at Narromine in the heavy going. Drawn out and will be launching late. HARRY (2) improving with racing and ready for the extra trip. Kept finding through the line when fourth over 800m at Narromine. No surprise to see him in the frame. RUTLEY EXCEEDS (5) finally drawn a decent gate and can race closer to the speed. Each way.
